findings: Exactly one active canonical row and one active semantic proposal use the same slug, entity type, owner, and upper-extremity context.
The canonical shared-anatomy registry and affected immutable packet use Acromioclavicular Joint; Ac Joint is an abbreviated historical proposal label, not a distinct clinical structure.
No canonical merge, relabel, ownership change, or graph write is required.
recommendedResolution: Normalize only the active proposal label to Acromioclavicular Joint, preserve Ac Joint in identity-resolution metadata, and fill the existing membership's canonical target.
